variants.text: Who let you in here? This area is for people who know how to vibe. Go back to the floor.

Sit down. Those doors stay locked for a reason. ARPU—Average Revenue Per User. If you can't leave, you spend. But you've been doing everything but that. Fixing the DJ's tech, calming the crowd... I've been watching you on the monitors.

offer.text: You've caused quite a stir tonight, kid. Relax. The night is young. Have a drink with me before you head out into the cold.

options.text: No thanks, I'm in a hurry.

drinkBranch.text:
[FADE TO BLACK]

Everything went fuzzy. You woke up at 3:00 AM on the VIP sofa. The deadline is gone. You failed.

jobBranch.text: Direct. I like that. Probably for the best—I usually save that bottle for people who don't know when to leave. I need a Floor Manager. Someone who can handle chaos. Stay here, run the floor, and I'll double whatever your future career pays.

options.text: I have to get out. Immediately.

averageEnding.text: You become the new Floor Manager. You have money, but your degree is abandoned.

successEnding.text: The Owner respects the hustle and hands you the keys. You burst out the VIP exit.
